title: Gateway Zephyr build references missing firmware bridge subsys path
description: While validating project-LICHEN-i81y.11, west build -p always -b nrf52840dk/nrf52840 lichen/apps/gateway -d build_gateway_i81y11 failed during CMake configure. lichen/zephyr/CMakeLists.txt calls add_subdirectory on ../../../firmware/bridge-zephyr/subsys, but that directory is absent in the current workspace. This prevents the gateway app from reaching compilation for BLE UART checks.
close_reason: Duplicate of project-LICHEN-i81y.20; the bad ../../../firmware/bridge-zephyr/subsys path is fixed and validated past CMake configure for the gateway build.
